POTIONCHANCE-SHOW_TRUE_CHANCE.title: Show true potion chance
POTIONCHANCE-SHOW_TRUE_CHANCE.hover.desc: This is normally impossible for the player to determine exactly.
POTIONCHANCE-ESTIMATOR.title: Estimator
POTIONCHANCE-ESTIMATOR.hover.desc: [gold]Simple[/gold] ignores the Elite bonus and is thus easily calculable but less accurate than [gold]HMM[/gold]. [gold]HMM[/gold] is recommended.
